positive: Minimalist geometric abstract pattern featuring stylized constellations and lunar phases, drawn with crisp, contrasting lines. The main subject is a cluster of stylized, glowing zodiac symbols forming a dynamic, symmetrical arrangement around a central celestial sphere. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, celestial gold, and stark ivory. Style should evoke mid-century modern graphic design mixed with ethereal astronomical charting. Highly detailed, suitable for silkscreen printing on fabric, emphasizing clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and central composition. Flat lay perspective.
